mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO FUND_MST ( FUND_CD, FUND_NM, FUND_TP_CD, MNG_CO_CD, RISK_GRD_CD, LIST_DT, CUR_CD, DATA_CRT_USR_ID, DATA_CHG_USR_ID, LAST_SRC_NM ) VALUES ( #{fundCd}, #{fundNm}, #{fundTpCd}, #{mngCoCd}, #{riskGrdCd}, #{listDt}, #{curCd}, 'BATCH', 'BATCH', #{lastSrcNm} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FUND_NM = VALUES(FUND_NM), RISK_GRD_CD = VALUES(RISK_GRD_CD), DATA_CHG_USR_ID='BATCH'
mapper.select: SELECT FUND_CD fundCd, FUND_NM fundNm, FUND_TP_CD fundTpCd, MNG_CO_CD mngCoCd, RISK_GRD_CD riskGrdCd, LIST_DT listDt, CUR_CD curCd, LAST_SRC_NM lastSrcNm FROM FUND_MST
